summary: Multiple vehicles are traveling on a multi-laned highway under clear skies with minimal traffic.

events_timeline.event: A convoy consisting of a red tanker truck and several cars travels along the highway.
A white sedan overtakes the convoy from the right side of the road.

uncertainties: The precise moment when the sedan overtakes the convoy is unclear.
Some details about the convoy’s composition are not fully observable.

risk_assessment.why: There are no collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions observed between the vehicles.
